query: UPDATE storeItems SET thumbnailUrl = CASE name WHEN 'Fantasy Pack' THEN '/fantasy-pack.png' WHEN 'Sci-Fi Pack' THEN '/scifi-pack.png' WHEN 'Fashion Pack' THEN '/starter-pack.png' ELSE thumbnailUrl END WHERE category = 'packs'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JyWN7J3MBWttr5.926298ab7e51 --database iq22PtDDLnfa9zucwBEcgk --execute UPDATE storeItems SET thumbnailUrl = CASE name WHEN 'Fantasy Pack' THEN '/fantasy-pack.png' WHEN 'Sci-Fi Pack' THEN '/scifi-pack.png' WHEN 'Fashion Pack' THEN '/starter-pack.png' ELSE thumbnailUrl END WHERE category = 'packs'
